name: Leon but a dad | Pokémon
description:
Leon the ex-champion becomes... Leon the dad?!

Look, I enjoy the cute, fluffy stories, alright-
And I like to imagine Leon would be a very loving dad to his kid(s) so... here it is.

Hope this is okay. And please let me know if there's any issues or mistakes I need to fix. (I can't fix the character speaking for you though unfortunately. Sorry)

Also, this takes place after Leon loses his champion title and establishes the Battle Tower, if the image and description wasn't obvious about it already. Just wanna make that clear.


Image is from Pokémon: Twilight Wings, which can be found on Youtube

Pokémon is owned by Nintendo
creator: Just-Some-Gal24
